member.name: M:MailMonitor.Api.Controllers.CompaniesController.GetAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists companies using optional filters by name and mail.

member.name: M:MailMonitor.Api.Controllers.CompaniesController.CreateAsync(MailMonitor.Api.Contracts.Companies.UpsertCompanyRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.response: Invalid payload or domain rule failure. Example: {"errors":{"name":["The Name field is required."]}}

member.name: M:MailMonitor.Api.Controllers.CompaniesController.UpdateAsync(System.Guid,MailMonitor.Api.Contracts.Companies.UpdateCompanyRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.response: Invalid payload including route/body id mismatch. Example: {"errors":{"id":["The route id must match body id."]}}

member.name: M:MailMonitor.Api.Controllers.EmailStatisticsController.GetAsync(MailMonitor.Api.Contracts.Statistics.EmailStatisticsQueryRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Obtiene estadísticas de procesamiento de correos con filtros opcionales.
member.param: Filtros opcionales: from, to, company, processed.
member.returns: Lista de estadísticas ordenada por fecha descendente.
member.response: Lista de estadísticas filtrada. Ejemplo: [{"date":"2026-03-20T09:30:00Z","company":"Contoso","processed":true,"subject":"Factura Marzo"}]
Rango de fechas inválido. Ejemplo: {"errors":{"to":["'to' must be greater than or equal to 'from'."]}}

member.name: M:MailMonitor.Api.Controllers.GraphSettingsController.GetAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets Microsoft Graph settings with masked secret.

member.name: M:MailMonitor.Api.Controllers.GraphSettingsController.UpdateAsync(MailMonitor.Api.Contracts.GraphSettings.UpdateGraphSettingsRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.response: Invalid payload or invalid scopes JSON. Example: {"errors":{"graphUserScopesJson":["GraphUserScopesJson must be a valid JSON array of strings."]}}

member.name: M:MailMonitor.Api.Controllers.HealthController.CheckGraphConnectivityAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates Microsoft Graph connectivity against a mailbox target.
member.param: Optional user mail. If omitted, the first configured company mailbox is used.
Optional mailbox id. If omitted, the first configured company mailbox is used.
member.response: Connectivity check failed or no mailbox target is configured.

member.name: M:MailMonitor.Api.Controllers.ReportsController.ExportAsync(MailMonitor.Api.Contracts.Statistics.EmailStatisticsQueryRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exporta estadísticas de correo a un archivo Excel.
member.param: Filtros opcionales: from, to, company, processed.
member.response: Rango de fechas inválido. Ejemplo: {"errors":{"to":["'to' must be greater than or equal to 'from'."]}}

member.name: M:MailMonitor.Api.Controllers.SettingsController.UpdateAsync(MailMonitor.Api.Contracts.Settings.UpdateSettingsRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.response: Invalid payload. Example: {"errors":{"baseStorageFolder":["The BaseStorageFolder field is required."]}}

member.name: M:MailMonitor.Api.Controllers.TriggersController.CreateAsync(MailMonitor.Api.Contracts.Triggers.UpsertTriggerRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.response: Invalid payload or invalid cron expression. Example: {"errors":{"cronExpression":["The cron expression format is invalid."]}}

member.name: M:MailMonitor.Api.Controllers.TriggersController.UpdateAsync(System.Guid,MailMonitor.Api.Contracts.Triggers.UpsertTriggerRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.response: Invalid payload or invalid cron expression. Example: {"errors":{"cronExpression":["The cron expression format is invalid."]}}
